channel.title: AI on Prerit Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Prerit Ahuja

item.title: Speaker - Data Management Summit London 2026
item.description:
On 26 March 2026 I will be speaking at the Data Management Summit London.

The panel will explore how financial institutions can move beyond fragmented data architectures to build unified data ecosystems that support accessibility, agility, and measurable business impact.

Key Takeaways Link to heading

Key observations from the panel discussion will be added here shortly after the event.

Topics expected to be discussed include:
